title: ProtectedPathPolicy
description: Policy that protects critical harness paths from unauthorized modification by agent tasks

protectedPaths.description: Glob patterns for paths that tasks must not modify

enforcementLevel.description: How violations are handled: error blocks, warn flags, off ignores

description.description: Human-readable description of what this policy protects

evidenceRequired.description: Evidence that must be provided before modifying a protected path

fullTestSuite.description: Full test suite must pass before modifying protected paths

independentReview.description: An independent agent review is required before modifying protected paths

sentinelInspection.description: Sentinel files must be inspected and accounted for

exemptPaths.description: Paths exempt from protection even if they match a protected pattern

exceptions.description: Per-task exceptions that override protection for specific paths
